app.title: CrosshairFlex
safe_mode.warning: Single-key switching may not work in some anti-cheat protected games.
home.title: HOME
home.subtitle: Select your active crosshair profile.
settings.temp_right: Temporary crosshair on Right Mouse hold
settings.temp_left: Temporary crosshair on Left Mouse hold
add.title: ADD / EDIT
keybinds.title: KEYBINDS
share.title: SHARE
share.subtitle: Share your profiles and setup with your team.
share.import_desc: Paste a shared code to import a profile.
share.copy_desc: Create a share link for the selected crosshair.
profile.title: PROFILE
onboarding.heading: CrosshairFlex
onboarding.intro: CrosshairFlex adds a pure, transparent desktop overlay crosshair without injecting into games.
onboarding.step1: 1) Build a profile in Add/Edit and save it only when ready.
onboarding.step2: 2) Switch Home view between vertical and horizontal profile cards.
onboarding.step3: 3) Assign keybinds and use Share to export/import profile links.
onboarding.step4: 4) Configure overlay behavior, theme, language, and startup options.
